whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug mode for the plugin. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.

verbose.title: Enable Verbose Mode
verbose.description: Display detailed information about rooms, modes, capabilities, and robot status at startup and during operation.

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown. Only for debugging purposes, not recommended for production use.

session.title: Xiaomi Cloud Session
session.description: Xiaomi Cloud authentication session tokens. Get these from your Xiaomi account.

region.title: Xiaomi Region
region.description: Xiaomi Cloud region for your account

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (ms)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll vacuum status in milliseconds

fountainPollInterval.title: Fountain Poll Interval (ms)
fountainPollInterval.description: How often to poll pet fountain status in milliseconds. Fountains sleep their Wi-Fi aggressively to save battery — a longer interval (30s+) is recommended.

fanPollInterval.title: Fan Poll Interval (ms)
fanPollInterval.description: How often (in milliseconds) to poll fan devices for status updates. Default: 10000 (10 seconds).

roomNames.title: Room Name Overrides
roomNames.description: Rename Xiaomi room names for display in Apple Home. Use the exact Xiaomi name (visible in startup logs) as 'From'.

to.title: Friendly Name
to.description: Name to show in Apple Home (e.g. 'Study')
